title: counter_init accepts NvmId::INVALID (0) without local validation
description: nvm_add and nvm_overwrite both reject NvmId::INVALID with a BadArgs error before making any FFI call. counter_init does not; passing NvmId::INVALID (0) sends ID=0 to the server and produces an opaque server-side error code. A user who accidentally passes NvmId::INVALID::new(0) or forgets to initialize their NvmId gets a confusing Wh { code: -XXXX } instead of a clear BadArgs message. Inconsistency also means contributors adding future counter-like APIs will not know which validation pattern to follow.
